codeReview.summary: Integration test for cross-permission-in-execution (VAL-CROSS-002) is well-implemented. The test file crates/swell-orchestrator/tests/cross_permission_in_execution.rs contains 3 tests validating that agents continue executing after permission denial without crashes. The permission denial is handled in execution.rs where PermissionTier::Deny is checked and returns a ToolOutput with is_error=true, allowing the agent to continue rather than crashing. All three tests pass and clippy reports no warnings.

summary: Review passes. The feature implements an integration test for cross-permission-in-execution (VAL-CROSS-002) that verifies agents continue executing after permission denial without crashes. The implementation correctly uses PermissionTier::Deny in execution.rs to surface permission denials as ToolOutput with is_error=true (not as Err), allowing the turn loop to continue. All 3 tests pass: test_turn_loop_handles_permission_denial_gracefully, test_agent_continues_after_permission_denial, test_multiple_denied_tools_do_not_crash. Clippy passes with no warnings. The worker followed procedure correctly per skillFeedback.
